---
title: 'Command reference'
description: 'Complete reference for every lomi. CLI command, subcommand, and global flag.'
---

All commands support global flags documented in [Getting started](/build/cli/overview#global-options).

## Authentication

### `lomi login`

Authenticate via browser device flow. Stores a CLI token globally.

```bash
lomi login
lomi login --no-browser
lomi login --profile sandbox
```

### `lomi logout`

Remove stored credentials for a profile.

```bash
lomi logout
lomi logout --profile sandbox
```

### `lomi whoami`

Show the active profile and account context.

```bash
lomi whoami
```

### `lomi status`

Verify login and API connectivity (`GET /` + `GET /accounts/balance`).

```bash
lomi status
```

### `lomi list-profiles`

List all saved auth profiles.

```bash
lomi list-profiles
```

### `lomi switch <profile>`

Set the default active profile.

```bash
lomi switch sandbox
```

---

## Project setup

### `lomi init`

Scaffold SDK client, examples, and `.env`. See [Initialize a project](/build/cli/init).

```bash
lomi init
lomi init --yes -e sandbox -L ts --api-key lomi_sk_test_xxx
```

### `lomi update`

Update `@lomi./sdk` in the current project (runs your package manager).

```bash
lomi update
```

---

## Development

### `lomi dev`

Start a local webhook development server. See [Local development server](/build/cli/dev).

```bash
lomi dev
lomi dev --port 4242
lomi dev --verify-signature
lomi dev --env-file .env.local
```

| Flag | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `-p, --port` | `4242` | HTTP port |
| `--env-file` | `.env` | Path to dotenv file |
| `--verify-signature` | `false` | Verify `lomi-signature` header |
| `--skip-rules-install` | — | Skip agent rules prompt |

**Endpoints:**

- `POST /webhook` — receive webhook events
- `GET /health` — health check

---

## Payments

These commands require authentication and run interactively (prompts for merchant ID, amounts, URLs, etc.).

### `lomi checkout create`

Create a hosted checkout session via `POST /checkout-sessions`.

```bash
lomi checkout create
```

Prompts for: merchant ID, price ID, success URL, cancel URL, optional customer email.

### `lomi payments create`

Create a payment link via the payment links API.

```bash
lomi payments create
```

Prompts for: merchant ID, title, price, currency.

---

## AI agent rules

### `lomi install-rules`

Install lomi. documentation for AI coding tools. See [Install agent rules](/build/cli/install-rules).

```bash
lomi install-rules
lomi install-rules --target cursor --target llms.txt
lomi install-rules --force
```

| Target | Output |
| --- | --- |
| `cursor` | `.cursor/rules/lomi.*.mdc` |
| `claude-code` | `CLAUDE.md` |
| `codex` | `AGENTS.md` |
| `vscode` | `.github/instructions/lomi-*.instructions.md` |
| `llms.txt` | Project-root `llms.txt` |

---

## Typical workflows

### New integration from scratch

```bash
npm install -g lomi.cli
lomi login
mkdir my-store && cd my-store
lomi init
lomi install-rules --target cursor
lomi dev
```

### Sandbox vs production profiles

```bash
lomi login --profile sandbox
lomi login --profile production
lomi switch sandbox
lomi init --profile sandbox
```

### CI pipeline

```bash
export LOMI_ACCESS_TOKEN=$CLI_TOKEN
lomi status
lomi init --yes -e sandbox -L ts --api-key $LOMI_API_KEY --skip-package-install --skip-rules-install
```

## Help

```bash
lomi --help
lomi login --help
lomi init --help
lomi dev --help
lomi install-rules --help
```
